outlook.summary: Market shows extreme bearish positioning with PCR 6.0-11.0 across expiries, but reverse_smirk skew suggests bullish undercurrents. Spot at 23867.5 faces immediate resistance at 23900-24000 zone. The massive 24300 CALL wall (1045 VOL) caps upside. Support established at 23500 PUT concentration. Negative total GEX (-0.00B) indicates dealers will amplify moves rather than suppress them. Contrarian setup: extreme pessimism often precedes mean reversion bounces.
